userStories.title: Create unified automation daemon that runs continuously
userStories.description: Build a central scheduler daemon that checks system time and triggers SMS outreach, email follow-ups, and social media posts at the correct times. Should run every 15-30 minutes.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/automation_daemon.py with main scheduler loop
Check system date/time on each iteration
Support multiple trigger types: SMS, Email, Social Media
Graceful error handling - one failure shouldn't stop other tasks
Can run as: python -m src.automation_daemon start
Supports --dry-run flag to preview without sending
userStories.notes: Core scheduler that orchestrates all automated outreach

userStories.title: Integrate SMS follow-up sequence processing
userStories.description: Connect automation daemon to existing follow_up_sequence.py to process due SMS touches at correct times
acceptanceCriteria: Process touches that are due (scheduled_at <= now)
Only send during business hours (8 AM - 8 PM local)

userStories.title: Integrate email scheduler processing
userStories.description: Connect automation daemon to email_scheduler.py to send due emails
acceptanceCriteria: Use existing email_scheduler.py send logic via SMTP
Send at scheduled_time (default 8:30 AM recipient timezone)
Update email status to 'sent' after success

userStories.title: Integrate social media post scheduler
userStories.description: Connect automation daemon to social media automation to post scheduled content
acceptanceCriteria: Post content that is due and status='scheduled'
Update post status to 'posted' after success
userStories.notes: CHECKPOINT: All three automation types integrated

userStories.title: Create launchd/cron setup for persistent running
userStories.description: Create proper macOS launchd plist or cron job to ensure scheduler runs automatically on system boot and stays running
userStories.notes: Ensures automation runs even after system restart

userStories.title: Add status dashboard and health checks
userStories.description: Create status command to show what's pending, what was sent, and overall health of automation system
acceptanceCriteria: Show: Next scheduled SMS (count, soonest date)
Show: Next scheduled emails (count, soonest date)
Show: Next scheduled social posts (count, soonest date)
Show: Any errors in last 24 hours
Show: Total sent today (SMS, email, posts)

userStories.title: Activate all campaigns and verify lead data quality
userStories.description: Change campaign status from 'preview' to 'active' for all campaigns, but first verify lead data has been corrected
acceptanceCriteria: Check leads.json for data quality (phone format, no duplicates)
Verify Apollo leads have valid phone numbers
Verify Yelp/Google Places leads have been corrected
Set dry_run: false for all campaigns
Assign business_id to all sequences missing it
userStories.notes: CHECKPOINT: Campaigns activated - this will start real outreach!

metadata.objective: Create automated scheduler that runs continuously to process SMS, email, and social media at correct times, then activate all campaigns
